allow: Bash(node --check js/network.js 2>&1; node --check js/state.js 2>&1; node --check js/models.js 2>&1)

Bash(python3 - <<'PYEOF'
path = '/mnt/c/Users/Dell/Desktop/dogfight_game/index.html'
with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Add touch-action to body tag
old = "        body {\\n            margin: 0;\\n            overflow: hidden;\\n            background-color: #87CEEB;\\n        }"
new = "        body {\\n            margin: 0;\\n            overflow: hidden;\\n            background-color: #87CEEB;\\n            touch-action: none;\\n            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;\\n        }"

if old in content:
    content = content.replace\(old, new, 1\)
    with open\(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(content\)
    print\("OK - body touch-action added"\)
else:
    print\("Target not found"\)
PYEOF)
